name: corporate-refi-65ltv
rationale: Corporate refi at standard 65% LTV (no high-LTV or band-callout interaction). Distinct from E14 (which tests corporate at high LTV); F03 isolates corporate-shape canonical_map handling at standard underwriting band — no F2.AC / F4.HL / F4.EL gates interfere. Pure corporate-canonical_map test.
notes: Single-event sequence. Controls for corporate × LTV interaction; E14 stresses corporate × edge LTV.
